challenge.hint: 💡 Golden tip: The same piece can fit multiple times.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to save your progress and lock your guess.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join to save your daily challenge progress.
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your device.

pages.aboutBio1: Bridging the gap between highly scalable enterprise architecture and premium audio production. With a deep focus on native APIs, zero-dependency environments, and strict TypeScript, I build software that performs at scale.
pages.aboutBio2: Beyond the code, I am a dedicated music producer specializing in R&B, Afropop, Kizomba, Kuduro, and Amapiano. Control and independence are at the core of my creative and technical workflows.
pages.svcSoftwareDesc: Highly scalable, zero-dependency backend systems and modern web applications built for millions of users.
pages.svcMusicDesc: Professional beat making, arrangement, and mixing across multiple genres using state-of-the-art studio tools.
pages.prodBeatDesc: High-fidelity Afropop & Amapiano instrumentals with full stem stems.
pages.prodBookDesc: Advanced patterns for scaling Go & Next.js applications.
